positive: A whimsical illustration of a stylized mountain range meeting a tranquil, glowing crescent moon. The mountains are depicted with solid, contrasting silhouettes in deep indigo and emerald green, embodying the aesthetic of a Nordic woodcut or sophisticated linocut print. Below the mountains, a gentle, flowing river reflects the moonlight, rendered with clean, curving lines. Minimal detail, strong contrast, perfect central composition, suitable for a repeating pattern or central apparel print. Color palette is limited to deep indigo, emerald green, ivory, and silver highlights. Aspect ratio must be square, vector art style, professional print quality, flat graphic design.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifacts, bad anatomy, low detail, cartoon, photorealism, gradients, muted colors, noisy, smudge, extra limbs
